name: fresh-catch
description: ``` fishshop/ │ ├── index.html                  ← Storefront (customer-facing) ├── styles.css                  ← Storefront styles ├── app.js                      ← Storefront logic ├── data.js                     ← Product data + WhatsApp number (edit here!) │ └── admin/     ├── index.html              ← Admin panel entry point     │     ├── css/     │   └── admin.css           ← Admin panel styles     │     └── js/         ├── store.js            ← Data layer (localStorage CRUD + analytics)         └── admin.js            ← Admin panel logic (auth, dashboard, products, orders) ```
